ops.note: 012c601 (PR #2): first clause met — a cancelled Encode returns ctx.Err() before queueing and after mutex acquisition (TestEncodePreCanceled, TestEncodeCanceledWhileWaiting), so no wedging of later requests. Second clause (interrupt in-flight em_load_model) deliberately NOT implemented per the user-resolved E1 design fork in the v0.31.0 follow-ups plan: WithCloseOnContextDone taxes the hot encode path; in-flight calls (<15 ms encode, one-time 60s-bounded load) run to completion by design.
